_claude_token_note: The Max-OAuth setup-token that every Claude-based automation (account router, sales-coach, briefs) shares. 1-yr token set 2026-06-24. When you rotate it (claude setup-token → update CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN in bluon-account-agent + bluon-sales-coach), bump this date so the hub's expiry warning resets.
_known_non_hub_note: Repos that burn Actions minutes but are deliberately NOT agent-automations (creative/data/site repos). Anything burning minutes that is NOT here and NOT in health_sync REPOS gets surfaced as a coverage gap for you to confirm.
_nudge_exempt_note: "repo/workflow.yml" entries that intentionally run on a cron but should NOT be nudged or flagged as drift (e.g. a public-repo safety-net sweep that never lags). Silences their drift warning so the box only shows real drift.
